queries.query: SELECT p.PAYMENT_ID, p.INVOICE_ID, p.PAYMENT_DATE, p.AMOUNT, p.PAYMENT_METHOD, p.REFERENCE, p.CREATED_DATE, i.INVOICE_NUMBER FROM HS_BILL_PAYMENTS p INNER JOIN HS_BILL_INVOICES i ON i.INVOICE_ID = p.INVOICE_ID ORDER BY p.PAYMENT_DATE DESC

SELECT p.PAYMENT_ID, p.INVOICE_ID, p.PAYMENT_DATE, p.AMOUNT, p.PAYMENT_METHOD, p.REFERENCE, p.CREATED_DATE, i.INVOICE_NUMBER FROM HS_BILL_PAYMENTS p INNER JOIN HS_BILL_INVOICES i ON i.INVOICE_ID = p.INVOICE_ID WHERE p.INVOICE_ID = @InvoiceId ORDER BY p.PAYMENT_DATE DESC
INSERT INTO HS_BILL_PAYMENTS (INVOICE_ID, PAYMENT_DATE, AMOUNT, PAYMENT_METHOD, REFERENCE) VALUES (@InvoiceId, @PaymentDate, @Amount, @PaymentMethod, @Reference)
SELECT ISNULL(SUM(AMOUNT), 0) AS TOTAL_PAID FROM HS_BILL_PAYMENTS WHERE INVOICE_ID = @InvoiceId
SELECT ISNULL(SUM(AMOUNT), 0) AS TOTAL_REVENUE FROM HS_BILL_PAYMENTS

SELECT TOP 5 p.PAYMENT_ID, p.AMOUNT, p.PAYMENT_DATE, p.PAYMENT_METHOD, i.INVOICE_NUMBER FROM HS_BILL_PAYMENTS p INNER JOIN HS_BILL_INVOICES i ON i.INVOICE_ID = p.INVOICE_ID ORDER BY p.PAYMENT_DATE DESC

SELECT ISNULL(SUM(inv_total.INVOICE_TOTAL), 0) - ISNULL((SELECT SUM(AMOUNT) FROM HS_BILL_PAYMENTS), 0) AS TOTAL_OUTSTANDING FROM ( SELECT i.INVOICE_ID, ISNULL(SUM(ii.LINE_TOTAL), 0) AS INVOICE_TOTAL FROM HS_BILL_INVOICES i LEFT JOIN HS_BILL_INVOICE_ITEMS ii ON ii.INVOICE_ID = i.INVOICE_ID WHERE i.STATUS NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Paid') GROUP BY i.INVOICE_ID ) AS inv_total
